concerns.text: FR-011 requires threshold sweeping over concrete values (absolute diff ∈ {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}). The idea's robustness section only mentions 'alternative diversity metrics' and 'subset of crops' — no threshold sweeping is requested. This is over-reach.

FR-013 requires 'validated instruments (with citable validation) for any questionnaires or measurement scales.' The idea contains no questionnaires or measurement scales — this is a template artifact that doesn't fit the research design. Over-reach.
FR-014 imposes a '6 hours on 2 CPU cores with ≤7 GB RAM' performance constraint. The idea mentions Docker ≤2GB but no analysis time or resource limits. This is over-reach.
The idea's robustness section explicitly requires 'subset of crops to assess generality.' The spec does not capture this robustness check. This is under-reach.
FR-008 text is garbled: 'record System MUST verify that EMP dataset contains...' — appears to be a copy-paste error with repeated phrases. Needs prose cleanup.
